01-basic.title: Basic
01-basic.description: Preset mode using the title prop — the simplest way to render a labeled expandable section.

02-accordion.title: Accordion
02-accordion.description: Controlled expand group where only one item can be open at a time.

03-custom-trigger.title: Custom Trigger
03-custom-trigger.description: Compound mode with a fully composed trigger — custom icon, badge, and layout.
03-custom-trigger.code:
import { Expand, Flex, Badge } from 'ui-lab-components'; import { FaUser } from 'react-icons/fa6'; export default function Example() { return (
Account Settings New

Manage your profile, password, and notification preferences.
); }

04-directions.title: Reveal Directions
04-directions.description: Content can reveal from above or horizontally using the from prop on Expand.Content.
04-directions.code:
import { Expand, Flex } from 'ui-lab-components'; export default function Example() { return (

from="above"

This content slides in from above the trigger.

from="right"

Expands horizontally to the right.
); }

05-settings-panel.title: Settings Panel
05-settings-panel.description: Grouped settings sections using compound mode with icons, dividers, and a list of rows.
05-settings-panel.code:
import { Expand, Flex } from 'ui-lab-components'; import { FaGear, FaCode } from 'react-icons/fa6'; export default function Example() { return (
General {['Language', 'Timezone', 'Date format'].map((setting) => ( {setting} Auto ))} Developer {['API keys', 'Webhooks', 'Debug mode'].map((setting) => ( {setting} Off ))}
); }

06-disabled.title: Disabled State
06-disabled.description: An isDisabled section is visually dimmed and blocks interaction.

07-inline-info.title: Inline Info
07-inline-info.description: A contextual disclosure pattern for surfacing supplementary information inline.
